message:
Integrate virtual scrolling with search UI and add tests

Completes P3.5a virtual scrolling integration:
- search.js: Virtual scrolling for results > 20 items
- styles.css: Virtual list and responsive layout styles
- virtual-list.test.html: Browser-based test suite (10K, 100K items)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
